---
title: "Assignment 06: Coordinate Systems"
author: "Bryce Hales"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Coordinate Systems

Practice R Markdown file for coordinate systems coursework.

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```
